title: geranium formosum
intro: Geranium formosum, also known as the "wild geranium" or "spotted cranesbill", is a perennial plant species in the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its distinctive flowers with five petals and a unique shape. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Geranium formosum include reducing inflammation, promoting skin health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Geranium formosum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
